description:
Phase 2 of fz-ul4.23. Free wins, no behavior change.

## Deliverables

- Delete src/codegen.rs, src/jit.rs, src/aot.rs, src/test_support.rs. All four are `#![cfg(any())]`-gated AND not mod-declared in main.rs — Cargo never sees them. Their preservation rationale (.11.9 cutover for intent verification) expired with .11.10-.11.14. Git history preserves them.
- Decide fz build: either (a) remove the subcommand entirely until Phase 6 wires it up, or (b) keep it as a clear-error stub. Recommend (a) — fz-ul4.22 (closed by Phase 6) will reintroduce it properly.
- Rename eval.rs to make its compile-time AST-evaluator role explicit. Candidates:
  - rename Interp -> AstEvaluator (or similar) inside eval.rs
  - or move eval.rs into a submodule of macros.rs as macros::ast_eval
  Decide based on whether REPL / test_runner are migrating off it (Phase 5) — if yes, the rename can be minimal; if no, full rename.

## Acceptance

- `cargo build` clean, `cargo test` green.
- `fz build` either gone or honestly errors.
- The word "interp" no longer appears in eval.rs at the type-name level (it's a compile-time evaluator, not the runtime interp).
- No references to deleted files remain in comments / docs / tickets-as-memory.
title: Mechanical cleanup: delete orphans, decide fz build, rename eval.rs
